mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in payroll employment growth above 150k per month signals strong labor market demand, driving corporate earnings optimism and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 70%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in 1-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in housing starts and consumer confidence (RSAFS) indicate weakening demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as recession risks materialize.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive when both HOUST and RSAFS decline, or the joint signal's IC falls below -0.03 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in industrial production below 90% of its 12-month moving average signals weakening supply chain capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 90, or the signal's IC exceeds -0.05 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% triggers central bank hawkishness, leading to higher discount rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5, or the signal's IC remains above -0.03 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDP growth above 3% annualized signals improved macroeconomic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain negative when GDPC1 exceeds 3, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising unemployment and stagnant wage growth indicates labor market weakness, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 70%+ of instances with UNRATE rising faster than CPIAUCSL, or the interaction signal's IC falls below -0.05 in 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production combined with rising oil prices signals supply shocks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 92.5 and CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.3, or the interaction signal's IC remains above -0.03 in 3-year windows.
